slides.title: EMCS — Toronto EMCS
slides.subtitle: Con Đường Đến Bằng Tốt Nghiệp Trung Học Canada — Ngay Tại Việt Nam
slides.subtitleEN: Your Pathway to a Canadian High School Diploma — Without Leaving Vietnam
slides.body: The Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) is Canada's most globally recognized high school credential. Now Vietnamese students can earn it 100% online, from Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, or anywhere — in as little as 8–12 months.
slides.badge: Ontario Ministry of Education Inspected School • BSID: 665588

slides.title: Thách Thức Mà Gia Đình Việt Nam Đang Đối Mặt
slides.titleEN: The Challenge Vietnamese Families Face Today
slides.subtitle: Vietnamese students have limited options — and all of them are expensive, stressful, or both.

challenges.option: Kỳ Thi Tốt Nghiệp THPT Quốc Gia (National Graduation Exam)
challenges.problem: One high-stakes exam determines everything. In 2026, many Vietnamese universities are moving away from using graduation exam scores as the sole admissions criteria — creating uncertainty. Extreme academic pressure with reported student mental health concerns.

Top-tier international schools now charge VND 681M–959M ($26,000–$38,500 USD) per year for high school. The International School Ho Chi Minh City (ISHCMC) and British International School lead at nearly $37,000–$38,500/year for 2025–26. Multi-year commitment required.
$15,000–$30,000 USD/year. Rigid 2-year commitment. Exam-heavy final assessment. Available at limited schools (ISHCMC, UWC, Renaissance).

Total cost $100,000+ CAD over 2–4 years (tuition + living). Canada rejected 62% of student visa applications in 2025 — the toughest stance in a decade. Vietnamese approvals decreased 6% in 2024 (from 7,210 to 6,775). Culture shock, language barriers, and separation from family.
challenges.source: IRCC Open Data, 2025; GradRight, 2025; LinkedIn/IRCC Analysis

slides.question: Có cách nào để con bạn nhận được bằng cấp quốc tế — với chi phí thấp hơn nhiều — mà không cần rời Việt Nam?
slides.questionEN: Is there a way for your child to earn a world-class credential — at a fraction of the cost — without leaving Vietnam?
slides.answer: Có. Đó là bằng OSSD — và EMCS là trường được Bộ Giáo Dục Ontario kiểm định để cấp bằng này.
slides.answerEN: Yes. It's called the OSSD — and EMCS is the Ministry-inspected school that delivers it.

slides.title: Bằng OSSD Là Gì?
slides.subtitle: The Ontario Secondary School Diploma — Canada's Gold Standard
slides.body: The OSSD is the official high school diploma issued by the Ontario Ministry of Education in Canada. It is the exact same diploma earned by every student graduating from high school in Ontario — the province home to the University of Toronto, Waterloo, McMaster, and Queen's University.

keyFacts.detail: Including all Canadian, US, UK, Australian, and European institutions
No single high-stakes national exam — continuous assessment throughout the course

keyFacts.fact: Self-paced — study on your own schedule
keyFacts.detail: Complete courses in as little as 4 weeks or take up to 12 months

keyFacts.fact: 100% online — no visa, no relocation, no classroom
keyFacts.detail: Study from Hanoi, HCMC, Da Nang, or anywhere with internet access

keyFacts.fact: Government-certified — inspected by Ontario's Ministry of Education
keyFacts.detail: EMCS BSID: 665588 — regularly inspected and authorized to grant OSSD credits

keyFacts.fact: Identical to diplomas earned in Toronto, Ottawa, and across Ontario
keyFacts.detail: University admissions officers cannot distinguish between online and in-person OSSD

slides.title: So Sánh OSSD Với Các Lựa Chọn Khác
slides.titleEN: Why Choose OSSD Over Other Options?
slides.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison with every alternative available to Vietnamese families.
slides.bottomLine: OSSD gives Vietnamese students a globally recognized credential at a fraction of the cost of international schools — without the extreme pressure of the national exam system. Canada ranks #4 globally for education (U.S. News & World Report, 2024) and consistently scores in the top 10 on PISA across reading, math, and science.

slides.title: Ai Nên Chọn EMCS?
slides.subtitle: OSSD is designed for ambitious Vietnamese students of every profile.

profiles.profile: University-Bound Students (Học Sinh Hướng Đại Học)
profiles.whyPerfect: Get accepted to top Canadian, US, UK, and Australian universities via OUAC — applying as a Canadian student, not international. Stronger positioning than Kỳ Thi THPT QG alone.
Add OSSD alongside your Vietnamese high school diploma. Study EMCS courses after school hours or on weekends. Graduate with two internationally recognized credentials.

profiles.profile: Students Planning to Study in Canada (Du Học Sinh)
profiles.whyPerfect: Build an active Ontario academic profile before applying for a study permit. Strengthen your visa application with real transcripts and grades from a Ministry-inspected school.

profiles.profile: Working Students & Adult Learners (Học Sinh Vừa Học Vừa Làm)
profiles.whyPerfect: Self-paced learning fits around work schedules. No classroom attendance required. Evening and weekend study. No age limit.

profiles.profile: Student Athletes (Vận Động Viên Học Sinh)
profiles.whyPerfect: Study around training schedules — mornings, evenings, rest days. No classes to miss for competitions or tournaments.

profiles.profile: Visa Recovery Students (Học Sinh Bị Từ Chối Visa)
profiles.whyPerfect: If your Canadian study permit was refused, start earning OSSD credits online now. Show immigration officers active transcripts and genuine academic commitment when you re-apply.

profiles.profile: Families Seeking Better Options (Gia Đình Tìm Lựa Chọn Tốt Hơn)
profiles.whyPerfect: A world-class credential at 5–10% of the cost of international schools in HCMC or Hanoi. No relocation, no disruption to family life.

profiles.profile: Students Struggling with the National Exam System
profiles.whyPerfect: OSSD uses continuous assessment (70% coursework) — no single exam determining your future. Lower stress, better learning outcomes.

slides.title: Điều Gì Khiến EMCS Khác Biệt?
slides.subtitle: Not just any online school. A Ministry-inspected, fully managed Ontario education program.

differentiators.feature: Ministry-Inspected (Bộ Giáo Dục Ontario Kiểm Định)
differentiators.details: BSID: 665588. Regularly inspected and authorized by the Ontario Ministry of Education to grant OSSD credits and diplomas.

differentiators.feature: Ontario Certified Teachers (Giáo Viên Chứng Nhận Ontario)
differentiators.details: Every credit course taught by teachers registered with the Ontario College of Teachers (OCT), with real classroom experience.

differentiators.feature: Two Flexible Pathways (Hai Lộ Trình Linh Hoạt)
differentiators.details: Start with the Academic Preparation Program to build foundations, then upgrade to the Official Ontario Program for credits. 'Learn First. Decide Later. Succeed Safely.'
Complete course catalog from Grades 1–12, covering English, Math, Science, Business, Arts, Technology, French, and Social Studies.
Start any day of the year — 365 days. No semester dates, no waitlists. Begin learning within 24–48 hours of registration.
Full LMS platform accessible on phone, tablet, or computer. Study when it works for you — perfect for Vietnamese time zones.

differentiators.feature: Teacher Support Within 48 Hours (Hỗ Trợ Giáo Viên Trong 48 Giờ)
differentiators.details: Ontario Certified Teachers respond to questions within 48 hours. Live office hours available for real-time help.

differentiators.feature: Direct Transcript Delivery (Gửi Bảng Điểm Trực Tiếp)
differentiators.details: Official Ontario transcripts sent directly to OUAC, OCAS, and educational institutions worldwide.
Join a global community of students already studying with EMCS from over 130 countries. Established since 2010.

slides.title: Quy Trình Đăng Ký & Học Tập
slides.subtitle: Getting started is simple — register today and begin learning within 24–48 hours.

steps.title: Register Anytime (Đăng Ký Bất Kỳ Lúc Nào)
steps.description: Sign up 365 days a year. No deadlines, no waitlists. Continuous enrollment means you start when you're ready.
details: Complete the online registration form at www.canadaemcs.com
If transcripts are not in English, a certified translation is required
Pay registration fee and entrance test fee

steps.title: Credit Assessment & Course Mapping (Đánh Giá Tín Chỉ & Lập Kế Hoạch)
steps.description: Our academic team reviews your Vietnamese transcripts and maps the fastest path to your OSSD.
details: We conduct an Equivalent Credit Assessment (PLAR) of your Vietnamese school records
We determine how many Ontario credits you've already earned from Lớp 10, 11, 12
We map your personalized course plan based on your university goals
Your Ontario Student Record (OSR) is created

steps.title: Start Learning (Bắt Đầu Học Tập)
steps.description: Access course materials 24/7. Our asynchronous platform fits your schedule — study when it works for you.
details: Log in to the EMCS learning platform within 24–48 hours
Begin self-paced coursework (interactive lessons, videos, activities)
Submit assignments and receive teacher feedback
Ontario Certified Teachers respond within 48 hours
Office hours available for real-time support

steps.title: Earn Your Credential (Nhận Bằng Cấp)
steps.description: Credits appear on official Ontario transcripts. Marks sent directly to OUAC, OCAS, and your target university.
details: Receive official Ontario report card (midterm + final)
OSSD credits recorded in the Ontario system
Transcripts delivered directly to OUAC, OCAS, or your chosen institutions
Upon completion of all requirements: OSSD diploma issued

slides.title: Yêu Cầu Tốt Nghiệp OSSD

compulsoryCredits.description: Core subjects including English (4 credits), Mathematics (3 credits), Science (2 credits), Canadian History, Canadian Geography, Arts, Health & Physical Education, French, Civics, Career Studies

electiveCredits.description: Subjects of student's choice aligned with university goals

creditTransfer.title: Chuyển Đổi Tín Chỉ — Học Sinh Việt Nam Có Thể Đã Có Tín Chỉ!
creditTransfer.titleEN: Credit Transfer — Vietnamese Students May Already Have Credits!
creditTransfer.explanation: If you've completed high school courses in Vietnam, we conduct a Prior Learning Assessment and Recognition (PLAR):
process: We review your official Vietnamese transcripts (Học bạ, Bảng điểm)
We grant equivalent Ontario credits for your prior studies at Vietnamese public or private schools
This REDUCES the number of courses you need to take with EMCS
Community involvement hours may also receive equivalencies
creditTransfer.keyInsight: Most Vietnamese students who have completed Lớp 11 or 12 need only 6–10 EMCS courses to earn their OSSD — not 30.

slides.title: Cánh Cửa Đại Học Toàn Cầu
slides.titleEN: University Pathways — Where OSSD Graduates Go
slides.subtitle: OSSD credentials are recognized by 1,000+ universities worldwide. Vietnamese EMCS graduates gain access to the same application channels as Ontario students.

canada.advantage: OSSD graduates apply through OUAC as Canadian applicants — not international. This means: lower admission requirements, no foundation year required, English-language requirements may waive IELTS/TOEFL, and stronger positioning for scholarships.

unitedStates.universities: 900+ US universities accept OSSD — including state universities, liberal arts colleges, and competitive programs
unitedStates.advantage: Canadian OSSD credentials are well-understood by US admissions offices

unitedKingdom.universities: Russell Group universities including Oxford, Cambridge, Imperial, LSE, UCL, Edinburgh, King's College London
unitedKingdom.advantage: OSSD is recognized by UCAS with established conversion equivalencies

australia.universities: Group of Eight — University of Melbourne, University of Sydney, ANU, UNSW, Monash
australia.advantage: Direct admission to undergraduate programs without foundation year

vietnam.note: OSSD credentials are also recognized by international universities operating in Vietnam (RMIT Vietnam, British University Vietnam, VinUniversity) for direct admission.

ouacAdvantage.title: Lợi Thế OUAC — Tại Sao Điều Này Quan Trọng Với Học Sinh Việt Nam
ouacAdvantage.titleEN: The OUAC Advantage — Why This Matters for Vietnamese Students
points: Apply as a DOMESTIC Canadian applicant (not international stream)
Lower admission requirements than international applicants
No foundation year or bridging program required
English-language requirements may waive IELTS/TOEFL — saving time and money
Stronger positioning for Canadian scholarships
Marks sent directly from EMCS to OUAC — verified and official

slides.title: Bảo Hiểm Visa — Biến Thời Gian Chờ Thành Thời Gian Học
slides.titleEN: The 'Visa Insurance' Option — Turn Waiting Time Into Study Time

vietnamContext.title: Khủng hoảng visa du học toàn cầu ảnh hưởng đến Việt Nam
vietnamContext.titleEN: The global visa crisis impacts Vietnamese students
stats: Canada rejected 62% of all student visa applications in 2025 — the toughest stance in a decade (IRCC, 2025)
Vietnamese study permit approvals decreased 6% in 2024, from 7,210 to 6,775 (IRCC/LinkedIn Analysis)
The US hit a 10-year high of 41% F-1 visa denials in FY2024 (US State Department)
Australia raised its student visa fee to AUD Included in 2025
Each failed visa application cycle costs Vietnamese families $3,000–$8,000+ CAD in non-refundable fees

solution.headline: Nếu đơn xin visa du học Canada của bạn bị từ chối — đừng chỉ chờ đợi.
solution.headlineEN: If your Canadian study permit was refused — don't just wait. Start your OSSD online NOW.
strategy: Enroll in EMCS and start earning OSSD credits immediately from Vietnam
When you re-apply in 6–12 months, show immigration officers:
→ Active transcripts proving you are a serious, committed student
→ Course progress and grades from a Ministry-inspected Ontario school
→ A clear, documented pathway from OSSD → Canadian university
benefits: Turn waiting time into productive study time
Build a significantly stronger re-application case
Earn credits that transfer to your future Canadian program
Demonstrate genuine 'bona fide' student intent to IRCC
Convert the sunk cost of a failed application into real academic progress
solution.disclaimer: Important: EMCS never guarantees visa approval. We help you build a stronger academic profile that demonstrates genuine student intent.

slides.title: Lựa Chọn Song Bằng — Giữ Trường Hiện Tại, Thêm Bằng Canada
slides.titleEN: The Dual Diploma Option — Keep Your Current School, Add a Canadian Diploma
slides.subtitle: Vietnamese students don't have to choose between their local education and an international credential.
howItWorks: Continue your Vietnamese high school education (trường THPT) during the day
Complete EMCS OSSD courses online in the evenings, weekends, or school holidays
Graduate with TWO diplomas — your Vietnamese Bằng Tốt Nghiệp THPT + Ontario OSSD
Apply to universities worldwide with BOTH credentials — maximum flexibility
benefits: Premium positioning on university applications — dual credentials stand out
Backup credential in case of underperformance on the Kỳ Thi THPT Quốc Gia
Global mobility — OSSD is recognized in 1,000+ universities that may not recognize Vietnamese diplomas
Low additional time commitment — Vietnamese Lớp 11/12 students typically need only 6–10 EMCS courses
No need to transfer schools, change schedule, or disrupt current education
slides.idealTimeline: Start EMCS courses in Lớp 11 (Grade 11) → complete OSSD by the end of Lớp 12 → apply to Canadian, US, UK universities while also sitting for the Vietnamese graduation exam.

slides.title: Câu Hỏi Thường Gặp

questions.q: Bằng OSSD có được công nhận toàn cầu không? (Is the OSSD recognized globally?)
questions.a: Yes — accepted by all major universities in Canada, US, UK, Australia, and internationally. The OSSD is Canada's official high school diploma.

questions.q: EMCS có được chính phủ Canada công nhận không? (Is EMCS officially recognized?)
questions.a: Yes — EMCS (BSID: 665588) is inspected and authorized by the Ontario Ministry of Education with full authority to grant OSSD credits and diplomas.

questions.q: Con tôi có cần visa du học không? (Does my child need a student visa?)
questions.a: No — EMCS is 100% online (asynchronous). No study permit or visa is required.

questions.q: Giáo viên EMCS là ai? (Who teaches EMCS courses?)
questions.a: Ontario Certified Teachers (OCTs) registered with the Ontario College of Teachers — the same credential required in Ontario public schools.

categories.category: Enrollment & Credit Transfer (Đăng Ký & Chuyển Đổi Tín Chỉ)

questions.q: Con tôi có thể chuyển đổi tín chỉ từ trường Việt Nam không? (Can my child transfer credits from Vietnamese school?)
questions.a: Yes — we conduct an Equivalent Credit Assessment (PLAR) from your official Vietnamese transcripts (Học bạ). Most students with Lớp 11 or 12 completion need only 6–10 additional courses.

questions.q: Cần những giấy tờ gì? (What documents are needed?)
questions.a: Official Vietnamese school transcripts (Học bạ, Bảng điểm) for the past 2–3 years. If not available in English, a certified translation is required.

questions.q: Khi nào có thể bắt đầu? (When can my child start?)
questions.a: Anytime — 365 days a year. Continuous enrollment, no set semester dates. Access within 24–48 hours of completing registration.

questions.q: Mất bao lâu để hoàn thành một khóa học? (How long to complete a course?)
questions.a: Up to 12 months maximum. Fast-track students can complete individual courses in as little as 4 weeks.

questions.q: Học phí bao gồm những gì? (What's included in tuition?)
questions.a: All course materials, platform access, Ontario Certified Teacher support, all tests and examinations, and report card issuance. No hidden fees.

questions.q: Có phí ẩn không? (Are there hidden fees?)
questions.a: No — tuition, registration fee, and entrance test fee (where applicable) are clearly stated. No surprise charges.
Credit card (Visa, Mastercard), international bank wire transfer. Contact your local EMCS education agent in Vietnam for additional local payment options.

questions.q: Có kế hoạch trả góp không? (Are installment plans available?)
questions.a: Contact EMCS or your local education agent for flexible payment arrangements.

slides.title: Tại Sao OSSD Phù Hợp Với Việt Nam?
slides.titleEN: Why OSSD Is a Perfect Fit for Vietnam
slides.subtitle: Vietnam's education landscape is evolving — and EMCS positions your family at the forefront.

marketContext.insight: Vietnam's Middle Class Is Growing Rapidly
marketContext.detail: Vietnam's middle class is expected to reach 26% of the population by 2026, up from 13% in 2023. Average monthly income per capita surged to VND 5.4 million ($216 USD) in 2024, a 9.1% increase. More families can now afford international education — but shouldn't have to pay international school prices.

marketContext.insight: Vietnamese Families Prioritize Education Over Everything
marketContext.detail: Education is the #1 household spending priority in Vietnam. Vietnamese families routinely invest 20–30% of household income in their children's education — higher than most ASEAN countries. EMCS makes a world-class credential accessible at a fraction of the cost.

marketContext.insight: The National Exam System Is Changing
marketContext.detail: In 2026, many Vietnamese universities will no longer admit students based solely on high school graduation exam (Kỳ Thi THPT QG) scores. This creates uncertainty for families who relied on the traditional pathway. OSSD provides a stable, internationally recognized alternative.

Vietnam is consistently among the top 10 source countries for international students in Canada. Despite tighter visa rules, Vietnamese students remain highly valued by Canadian universities. An OSSD credential strengthens both university admission and future visa applications.

marketContext.insight: Vietnam's Tech Boom Creates Demand for Global Credentials
marketContext.detail: Vietnam's thriving tech and startup ecosystem (FPT, VNG, VinTech) increasingly values employees with international educational backgrounds. An OSSD opens doors to computer science, engineering, and business programs at top Canadian universities that feed directly into this pipeline.

slides.closingMessage: Không cần cam kết. Không áp lực. Chỉ cần câu trả lời.
slides.closingMessageEN: No commitment. No pressure. Just answers.
slides.tagline: EMCS — Con đường đến bằng tốt nghiệp Canada và các trường đại học hàng đầu thế giới.
slides.taglineEN: EMCS — Your pathway to a Canadian diploma and the world's best universities.
